items.claim: Felipe Franco's jiu-jitsu skills are basic.
items.quote: Felipe Franco's jiu-jitsu looks very basic to me

items.claim: Levi Rodriguez Jr. has high knockout potential.
items.quote: Levi Rodriguez Jr. super live for knockout.

items.claim: Suk Hyung has solid takedown ability.
John Paul Leos Noyani possesses high-level jiu-jitsu skills.
John Paul Leos Noyani is dangerous off his back with triangles.
items.quote: He's got nasty triangles off of his back.

items.claim: John Paul Leos Noyani is capable of aggressive and mobile striking.
items.quote: John Paul Leos Noyani can hack up head kicks, get aggressive when he needs to, be mobile when he needs to.

items.claim: Suk Hyung is a better wrestler than John Paul Leos Noyani.
items.quote: Hook Co might be the better wrestler here.

items.claim: Suk Hyung utilizes a rangy, open-hand striking style that makes him difficult to hit.
items.quote: Hook Co is is rangy and has the open hand style where his head's way back here. It's kind of hard to get to him.

items.claim: Austin Bashy relies on wrestling and rear-naked chokes.
items.quote: If you're on Austin Bashy, you like the wrestling. You like the rear naked strangle game.

items.claim: Jose Delgado is effective at striking at range.
items.quote: if you're on Jose Delgado, you love the striking at range, the knees, the punches

items.claim: Jose Delgado was taken down three times in his last fight against Andre Phely.
items.quote: in Jose Delgato's last fight, he got taken down not once, NOT TWICE, BUT THREE times to Andre Phely.
